channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Gemini for Home expands: Google opens access to carriers and hardware makers
item.description: Google's Gemini expanded to more developers, companies, service providers, and more, as it looks to break open access to other device makers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Gemini for Home expands to developers, hardware makers, and service providers, so more devices can utilize its AI intelligence for smarter homes.
media:content.media:text: Gemini for Home expands to developers, hardware makers, and service providers, so more devices can utilize its AI intelligence for smarter homes.
media:content.media:title: Gemini for Home expands to developers, hardware makers, and service providers, so more devices can utilize its AI intelligence for smarter homes.

item.title: Treat your ears to $150 OFF for these high-quality noise cancelling headphones at Best Buy
item.description: Memorial Day Weekend is almost here, and buyers can save $150 on the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones
media:content.media:text: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones
media:content.media:title: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones

item.title: T-Mobile's network-native AI Live Translation beta is here, and this is just the start
item.description: T-Mobile stayed true to its word and started rolling out its network-native AI Live Translation feature for customers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The T-Mobile Logo on a Google Pixel 8 Pro
media:content.media:text: The T-Mobile Logo on a Google Pixel 8 Pro
media:content.media:title: The T-Mobile Logo on a Google Pixel 8 Pro

item.title: How fast is the Motorola Razr Fold charging speed?
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold packs in a large silicon-carbon battery that can be juiced up in almost no time, provided you have the right charger.
item.author: sharmarajat@zoho.com (Rajat Sharma)
item.dc:creator: Rajat Sharma

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold taskbar
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold taskbar
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold taskbar

item.title: Chatter says Nothing's CMF Phone 3 Pro is delayed, specs and launch leak
item.description: Rumors talk about CMF by Nothing's next budget phone, stating the Phone 3 Pro could switch to a mid-range Qualcomm chip and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Comparing the backs and camera lenses of the orange CMF Phone 1 to the teal CMF Phone 2 Pro
media:content.media:text: Comparing the backs and camera lenses of the orange CMF Phone 1 to the teal CMF Phone 2 Pro
media:content.media:title: Comparing the backs and camera lenses of the orange CMF Phone 1 to the teal CMF Phone 2 Pro

item.title: 4 phones to buy instead of the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026
item.description: If you love the idea of the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 but don't love the price, these are the four alternatives you should consider.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 cover screen
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 cover screen
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 cover screen

item.title: The original Chromecast might finally be reaching the end of the road
item.description: Apps like YouTube and HBO Max are no longer detecting the original Chromecast for some users.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Chromecast
media:content.media:text: Chromecast
media:content.media:title: Chromecast

item.title: I used the OnePlus Pad 4 for three weeks — Here are 5 things I learned
item.description: The OnePlus Pad 4 delivers excellent battery life, flagship performance, and one of Android's best multitasking experiences, but the ecosystem still feels half-baked.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Hands on with the OnePlus Pad 4
media:content.media:text: Hands on with the OnePlus Pad 4
media:content.media:title: Hands on with the OnePlus Pad 4

item.title: Xreal Project Aura crams a whole VR headset into a pair of smart glasses, and it's exactly what Android XR was made for
item.description: Xreal and Google have been working on a pair of smart glasses that will redefine how you see the category, and we finally got to see them in-person at Google I/O.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Xreal Project Aura glasses dimming off
media:content.media:text: Xreal Project Aura glasses dimming off
media:content.media:title: Xreal Project Aura glasses dimming off

item.title: The Best Buy Memorial Day sale chops $50 OFF the price of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is still a solid pick, despite being a 2024 release.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7s of various colors on orange, green, blue and white backgrounds
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7s of various colors on orange, green, blue and white backgrounds
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7s of various colors on orange, green, blue and white backgrounds

item.title: The Motorola Razr 2026 is slightly more expensive, but it's still the best budget flip phone you can buy. Here's why
item.description: The Razr 2026 isn't quite the deal it was last year, but there are enough upgrades to ensure this is still the best-value flip phone in Motorola's lineup.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.

item.title: I want to love the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, but after testing it for two weeks, there's one major problem holding me back
item.description: The Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 is a good phone, but for $1,500, it's hard to recommend. After testing it for two weeks, it feels more like the Razr Ultra 2025 Part II.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2026 on a table

item.title: Wait—was that a Pixel 11 teaser? Theories are buzzing after Google's I/O
item.description: Users online were buzzing, as they theorized that Google might've given the briefest teaser for the Pixel 11 at I/O 2026.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: An AI-generated video shows a user holding a Pixel, and the area around its camera bar glows, leading users to wonder if Google teased the Pixel 11 during I/O 2026.
media:content.media:text: An AI-generated video shows a user holding a Pixel, and the area around its camera bar glows, leading users to wonder if Google teased the Pixel 11 during I/O 2026.
media:content.media:title: An AI-generated video shows a user holding a Pixel, and the area around its camera bar glows, leading users to wonder if Google teased the Pixel 11 during I/O 2026.

item.title: Android 17 catches up to Apple with a long-overdue cross-device upgrade
item.description: Android 17’s new Continue On feature finally lets Android users seamlessly switch apps between phones and tablets, though Google is clearly playing catch-up to Apple.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: a hand-off like feature on an Android tablet
media:content.media:text: a hand-off like feature on an Android tablet
media:content.media:title: a hand-off like feature on an Android tablet

item.title: It's getting harder to ignore Gemini in Google services, and that's a problem
item.description: Google showcased its AI vision, and it basically involves Gemini everywhere.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: New Google search features powered by Gemini
media:content.media:text: New Google search features powered by Gemini
media:content.media:title: New Google search features powered by Gemini

item.title: The Google AI Pro plan just got a quiet downgrade, here is the new deal
item.description: The updated AI Pro plan now limits usage based on compute-heavy prompts.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max
media:content.media:text: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max
media:content.media:title: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max

item.title: Meta chops 8,000 in May layoff spree, and it's only getting worse
item.description: Reports say Meta has axed 8,000 employees this week, and it looks like the company really wants AI by this point.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Meta's company page on Facebook
media:content.media:text: Meta's company page on Facebook
media:content.media:title: Meta's company page on Facebook

item.title: This powerful smartwatch just landed $250 OFF for Best Buy's Memorial Day sale
item.description: The Garmin Fenix 8 is a pricey watch, making it crucial to find and take advantage of deals like these.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Photo of the Garmin Fenix 8 on an athlete's wrist, showing a daily suggested workout.
media:content.media:text: Photo of the Garmin Fenix 8 on an athlete's wrist, showing a daily suggested workout.
media:content.media:title: Photo of the Garmin Fenix 8 on an athlete's wrist, showing a daily suggested workout.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 might miss major features, and its display sounds so disappointing
item.description: Additional Galaxy Z Fold 8 series rumors alleged missing features, and it looks like you can forget about a Privacy Display.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 in Blue Shadow hands-on
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 in Blue Shadow hands-on
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 in Blue Shadow hands-on

item.title: The capable Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus is now $300 OFF at Amazon, days ahead of the official Memorial Day Weekend sale
item.description: The Galaxy S25 Plus is backed by the user-friendly One UI 7, and this price point makes it a certified deal.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Galaxy S25 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:text: Galaxy S25 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:title: Galaxy S25 Plus face down on a table

item.title: Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 is here, and it’s all about the boring fixes you actually wanted
item.description: Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 smooths out Pixel usability with polished UI tweaks, smarter defaults, and more blur effects.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Nothing Phone 3
media:content.media:text: The Android 17 logo on a Nothing Phone 3
media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Nothing Phone 3

item.title: I got to try Android XR glasses at Google I/O, and I'm more excited about smart display glasses than I've ever been
item.description: Google had a few Android XR demos at its annual I/O event. With the glasses coming later this year, I got to try them on for size.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Wearing Google Android XR prototypes
media:content.media:text: Wearing Google Android XR prototypes
media:content.media:title: Wearing Google Android XR prototypes

item.title: Wear OS 7 is bringing one of Android 17's best features to your smartwatch
item.description: Google has officially unveiled Wear OS 7 with Live Updates, improved battery life, and a brand-new widget experience for smartwatches.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The new app drawer on Wear OS 6 on the Pixel Watch 3
media:content.media:text: The new app drawer on Wear OS 6 on the Pixel Watch 3
media:content.media:title: The new app drawer on Wear OS 6 on the Pixel Watch 3

item.title: Is my phone getting Android 17?
item.description: The stable version of Android 17 will be rolling out shortly. Let's take a look at what phones will get the update, and when.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Pile of phones with Pixel 10 Pro XL showing Android 17 logo
media:content.media:text: Pile of phones with Pixel 10 Pro XL showing Android 17 logo
media:content.media:title: Pile of phones with Pixel 10 Pro XL showing Android 17 logo

item.title: 5 important Gemini updates from Google I/O that could genuinely save you time
item.description: From AI shopping carts to smarter Search and Gmail, Gemini is now deeply integrated across Google.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide vs. Motorola Razr Fold: Will it be worth the compromise?
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide is expected to be a Pixel Fold-style foldable with an almost square aspect ratio. But the Motorola Razr Fold will be a formidable rival around the same price.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: Motorola Razr 2026 vs. Razr 2025: A few steps forward, one big step back
item.description: Motorola's budget Razr isn't as budget, but the 2026 model is a still a valuable addition to the lineup better than its predecessor in every way but one.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand

item.title: Did Google use a MacBook during its live demo at Google I/O?
item.description: Google used a MacBook during the Antigravity demo and it's super funny.
item.author: shruti.shekar@futurenet.com (Shruti Shekar)
item.dc:creator: Shruti Shekar

media:content.media:description: google using a mac during google io
media:content.media:text: google using a mac during google io
media:content.media:title: google using a mac during google io

item.title: Google’s new $100 AI plan wants to turn Gemini into a full productivity machine
item.description: Google is turning Gemini into a premium AI ecosystem with pricier power-user tiers, smarter tools, and usage limits that now feel a lot like AI surge pricing.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google AI Ultra subscription
media:content.media:text: Google AI Ultra subscription
media:content.media:title: Google AI Ultra subscription

item.title: Google I/O gets into a Flow: preps Flow Music app and generative editing for on-the-go
item.description: Google's AI cascades into Flow and Flow Music, as it announced extreme Omni Flash AI upgrades and apps for mobile.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.
media:content.media:text: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.
media:content.media:title: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.

item.title: Tired of video editing? Google’s Gemini Omni changes scenes when you ask
item.description: Google’s Gemini Omni turns AI video creation into a conversation, but while the tools look powerful, spotting what’s real online may soon get a lot harder.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Gemini Omni launching at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Gemini Omni launching at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Gemini Omni launching at Google I/O 2026

item.title: This Google AI tool can now build Android apps from text prompts
item.description: Google AI Studio can now generate native Android apps from prompts, complete with emulator testing and Play Console integration.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens

item.title: Google Play is getting a huge AI upgrade with Ask Play and Play Shorts
item.description: Google announced a wave of Google Play updates, including Ask Play AI search, Play Shorts, and Gemini app discovery.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC
media:content.media:text: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC
media:content.media:title: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC

item.title: Google's new YouTube AI tools could make AI slop impossible to escape
item.description: Google announced Ask YouTube conversational search and Gemini Omni-powered Shorts remixing tools at I/O 2026.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube app on Samsung TV
media:content.media:text: YouTube app on Samsung TV
media:content.media:title: YouTube app on Samsung TV

item.title: Forget CamelCamelCamel: Google's new Universal Cart will track prices and find deals for you
item.description: Google's new Universal Cart tracks prices, stock changes, and deals across multiple retailers automatically.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google
media:content.media:text: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google
media:content.media:title: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google

item.title: Dreaming of Project Genie? Google I/O unveils 'Street View,' putting imaginary worlds into ours
item.description: Google's Project Genie slips into the real-world, thanks to Street View and your imagined prompts for re-created AI places.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Deepmind
media:content.media:text: Google Deepmind
media:content.media:title: Google Deepmind

item.title: Google Workspace just went 'Live' with Docs and Gmail, using your voice for less stress
item.description: Google I/O 2026 announced a massive selection of Workspace updates that make managing your days easy, stress-free, and oh, so simple.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.
media:content.media:text: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.
media:content.media:title: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.

item.title: Google is giving Search its biggest overhaul in 25 years
item.description: Google just turned Search into an AI-powered assistant that chats, books, tracks, and monitors the web for you.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google's new AI search agents at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Google's new AI search agents at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Google's new AI search agents at Google I/O 2026

item.title: Google thinks Gemini 3.5 Flash can finally make AI agents more useful
item.description: Google’s Gemini 3.5 Flash is built to handle complex AI tasks faster, pushing Gemini beyond chatbots and deeper into full-blown AI agent territory.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Gemini Flash on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Gemini Flash on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Gemini Flash on stage at Google I/O 2026

item.title: Samsung, Google merge fashion and AI for 'Intelligent Eyewear' with Gentle Monster, Warby Parker
item.description: Samsung and Google partner to announce "Intelligent Eyewear," a new venture for glasses that brings style to AI technology.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.
media:content.media:text: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.
media:content.media:title: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.

item.title: Planning a wedding? Google's new Gemini Spark AI agents might actually help
item.description: Google announced Gemini Spark, a new proactive AI agent powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash that can automate tasks across apps and services.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: Google's new Gemini features will take all the annoying busywork off your plate

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: RedMagic's 11S Pro is a gaming beast, and it's crazy to think Liquid Cooling is in this phone
item.description: RedMagic 11S Pro series gets launched in China, and it's an incredible gaming beast with Liquid Cooling that seems poised for a global debut.

item.title: Google could fix the absolute worst thing about passkeys on Android
item.description: Google may finally let Android users move passkeys between password managers, fixing one of the biggest headaches with the passwordless future.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Apple reveals WWDC 26 in the shadow of Google I/O

item.title: Google's new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive and more are finally rolling out
